name: codex-mem
description: Local-first project memory for Codex with SQLite, Chroma, transcript snippets, Obsidian markdown export, and a local dashboard.

interface.shortDescription: Project memory for Codex with hybrid search, exact snippets, Obsidian notes, and a dashboard.
interface.longDescription: Codex Mem builds a local project-memory system over ~/.codex/sessions with fast SQLite retrieval, optional Chroma semantic search, exact transcript snippet search, project-group recall, last-time summaries, a standalone local dashboard, and automatic Obsidian-compatible markdown export.
defaultPrompt: Show related sessions for this working directory before I begin.
Find the exact snippet where we hit this error and give me the Obsidian note link.
Summarize what we decided last time for this project.
